name_en: Ministry of Health and Medical Education
name_fa: وزارت بهداشت، درمان و آموزش پزشکی
description: Iran's Ministry of Health and Medical Education (Vezarat-e Behdasht, Darman va Amuzesh-e Pezeshki) is responsible for public health policy, medical education, pharmaceutical regulation, and the national healthcare system. It oversees medical universities across the country. Notable ministers include [Marzieh Vahid-Dastjerdi](/people/marzieh-vahid-dastjerdi) (2009–2012), who was the first female cabinet minister in the history of the Islamic Republic.
editorial_notes: Created in 1985 by merging the Ministry of Health with the Ministry of Higher Education's medical education functions.
